name: Aisha Rahman
bio: We studied Computer Science together at Dhaka University. She now works as a UX designer and loves traveling.

name: Tanvir Hasan
bio: Former colleague who introduced me to weight training. We still try to meet for workouts on weekends.

name: Nusrat Jahan
bio: Friend from high school. She’s a freelance illustrator and often shares her artwork with me.

name: Imran Chowdhury
bio: My cousin who lives in Chittagong. We used to play cricket together during family gatherings.

name: Farzana Akter
bio: Neighbor and fellow book lover. We exchange novels and discuss them over tea.

name: Rafiul Karim
bio: Met at a startup event. We often discuss new tech ideas and potential collaborations.

name: Sadia Islam
bio: Travel partner for multiple trips around Bangladesh. We’re planning a trip to Bandarban next.

name: Mahmudul Hasan
bio: Childhood friend and football enthusiast. We still catch matches together whenever possible.
